title: Liquid Chalk Pens – 8 Bright Chalk Markers for Blackboards & Chalkboards, Windows & Glass | Erasable 6mm Pens for Kids, Classrooms & Crafts
features: Vibrant Multicolour Chalk Pens – Bright liquid chalk markers in assorted coloured inks for blackboards, windows, tuff trays and menus. These erasable chalk pens provide vivid, eye-catching results every time, with neon brightness that stands out at home, school or restaurants.

AMAZING VERSATILITY GREAT FOR KIDS - Neon chalk markers and Fun Pens are Non Toxic and Odorless and will out last ANY other Coloured Chalk Pens with their huge capacity. The Glass markers allow you to decorate any ordinary NON-POROUS surface - including chalk labels, mirrors, shop storefront windows, Blackboard, whiteboard, metal and more - into your very own canvas!

SUPER EASY CLEAN UP - The bright, beautiful liquid chalk Ink in each ChalkBrights Chalk marker is completely dust-free which makes cleanup a breeze for these erasable chalk pens! Simply use a dry or damp cloth to wipe the chalk away without any smearing, streaking, smudging or messes! NOTE: Our liquid chalk is non-toxic and odor-free

REVERSIBLE TIP GREAT FOR TEACHING - Make great Teaching Supplies as Teachers at Preschool, Nurseries, High Schools and Colleges all love ChalkBrights Chalk Markers as they can be used just like ordinary Wet Erase or Dry Erase Markers but the colors are So much more Opaque, the reversible 6mm tip gives you the option of fine tip markers for detail work or broad chisel tip markers for when big bold lines are needed. The bright neon colours make for great visible explanations and student attention

SAFER AND CLEANER. Each and every one of our markers is safe for you and the kids. Our paint markers are water-based, non-toxic and dust-free. To boot, they're made with Japanese imported ink and the finest water-soluble and bio-degradable chemicals - 100% safe for both animals and the environment.
description: Product Description Fantastic Chalk Pens Chalk Pen Dustless, non-toxic formula and safe for use at home. Chalk Marker Colours And Nib Type MADE FOR EVERYONE - Whether you're a Teacher, Mum, Student, Artist, Kid, Business, Office or Restaurant Owner our white liquid chalk ink markers make creating beautiful messages effortless. How to use Instructions Simple instructions to get the chalk liquid into the pen. Easy Clean WIPES OFF EASY - Our water-based ink is washable and delivers smudge free lines. A mere wipe of a wet paper towel will remove your finished ink from any non-porous surface & the ink is Permanent on porous surfaces Scenarios THE ULTIMATE FREEDOM OF EXPRESSION. Kids B Crafty chalk paint markers are great to decorate wedding signs, shop storefront, milestone boards, menus, LED boards, contact paper, car mirrors, glass. Turn Every Surface Into a Canvas with Fantastic Chalk Brights Turn Every Menu Into a Canvas with Fantastic Chalk Brights Create, learn and play with vibrant chalk pens. Perfect for tuff trays, blackboards, windows and school projects — safe, dust-free and easy to wipe clean.
